headline: Trump's pick for Fed chair could be the richest in modern times
summary: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's pick to become the next Federal Reserve chairman, would probably be the wealthiest central bank leader in recent decades if confirmed, newly released financial disclosures show. The 69-page filing, published Tuesday by the Office of Government Ethics, details a fortune well in excess of $100 million, along with stakes in dozens of start-ups and tech firms such as Elon Musk's SpaceX. Warsh's wife, Estée Lauder heiress Jane Lauder, owns assets of her own that

headline: Trump’s Fed Chair Nominee Earned Millions From Investment Firms. New Filings Detail His Wealth.
summary: Kevin Warsh would have to terminate consulting work, resign from boards, and sell dozens of holdings if confirmed.

headline: Trump’s Fed Pick Discloses $100M+ in Assets, Pledges Divestment
summary: Warsh's wealth vastly eclipses that of all recent Federal Reserve chairs.

headline: Trump's Fed Nominee Is 20x Richer Than The President, With Stakes In SpaceX, Polymarket
summary: New financial disclosures released by Kevin Warsh reveal how much President Donald Trump's pick to lead the Federal Reserve could be worth and what he holds stakes in.

headline: The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (EL) and Puig Merging to Create Largest Premium Beauty Player
summary: The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) is one of the top consumer defensive stocks to buy now. On April 7, Reuters reported that the founding families of Spanish firm Puig and The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE:EL) are poised to meet to negotiate terms of a potential merger.
